summary: NLYT Phase 3 (Capture + Distribution) testing completed. All 42 backend tests pass. Distribution service, wallet service, attendance hooks, scheduler job, and API endpoints all verified.

backend: compute_distribution() function exists with correct signature
Organizer no_show → present participants logic exists (symmetry rule)
Zero present participants → platform absorption logic exists
Rounding invariant logic exists (sum always equals capture_amount)
Zero penalty returns empty distribution logic exists
create_distribution() has idempotency guard on guarantee_id
cancel_distribution() function exists with refund logic
Distribution hold expiry job runs every 15 minutes
capture_guarantee() has dev mode simulation (pi_dev_* IDs)

verified_features.compute_distribution: Pure calculation with platform/charity/compensation splits. Participant no_show → organizer. Organizer no_show → present participants (symmetry rule). Zero present → platform absorbs compensation.
verified_features.create_distribution: Creates distribution document + credits wallets pending_balance. Idempotent on guarantee_id.
verified_features.finalize_expired_holds: Scheduler job converts pending→available after 15-day hold. Skips contested distributions.
verified_features.cancel_distribution: Refunds all beneficiary wallets via debit_refund().
verified_features.contest_distribution: Only no_show user can contest during pending_hold period.
verified_features.attendance_hooks: _process_financial_outcomes() called after evaluation. _process_reclassification() handles both directions (no_show↔present).

mocked_apis.stripe_capture: MOCKED - Stripe PaymentIntent capture is simulated in dev mode (returns pi_dev_* IDs)

seed_data_creation: None - tests use code structure verification and API endpoint testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Distribution implemented and tested. Key components: (1) compute_distribution() handles participant no_show → organizer, organizer no_show → present participants (symmetry), zero present → platform. (2) create_distribution() is idempotent on guarantee_id, credits wallets pending_balance. (3) finalize_expired_holds() runs every 15 minutes, converts pending→available after 15-day hold, skips contested. (4) cancel_distribution() refunds wallets. (5) contest_distribution() only by no_show user during pending_hold. (6) Attendance hooks: _process_financial_outcomes() after evaluation, _process_reclassification() handles both directions. (7) API endpoints: GET/POST /api/wallet/distributions, GET /api/appointments/:id/distributions. MOCKED: Stripe capture (pi_dev_* IDs in dev mode).
